'''tahuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yokelishness|yokelishness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yokelishness|yokelishness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tahuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæhiyith|tæhiyith]] || [[word:tæhiyij|tæhiyij]] || [[word:tæhiyish|tæhiyish]] || [[word:tæhiyi|tæhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tahuhuyuth|tahuhuyuth]] || [[word:tahuhuyuj|tahuhuyuj]] || [[word:tahuhuyush|tahuhuyush]] || [[word:tahuhuyu|tahuhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tahuyuth|tahuyuth]] || [[word:tahuyuj|tahuyuj]] || [[word:tahuyush|tahuyush]] || [[word:tahuyu|tahuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tahufyuth|tahufyuth]] || [[word:tahufyuj|tahufyuj]] || [[word:tahufyush|tahufyush]] || [[word:tahufyuf|tahufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tahuyuthu|tahuyuthu]] || [[word:tahuyuju|tahuyuju]] || [[word:tahuyushu|tahuyushu]] || [[word:tahuyuku|tahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tahuyuth|tahuyuth]] || [[word:tahuyuj|tahuyuj]] || [[word:tahuyush|tahuyush]] || [[word:tahuyu|tahuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tahuyuthul|tahuyuthul]] || [[word:tahuyujul|tahuyujul]] || [[word:tahuyushul|tahuyushul]] || [[word:tahuyukul|tahuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tahuyuthuthu|tahuyuthuthu]] || [[word:tahuyujuju|tahuyujuju]] || [[word:tahuyushushu|tahuyushushu]] || [[word:tahuyuku|tahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tahuyuthun|tahuyuthun]] || [[word:tahuyujun|tahuyujun]] || [[word:tahuyushun|tahuyushun]] || [[word:tahuyukun|tahuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tahuyuthuoro|tahuyuthuoro]] || [[word:tahuyujuoro|tahuyujuoro]] || [[word:tahuyushuoro|tahuyushuoro]] || [[word:tahuyukuoro|tahuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
